title: Pseudohexadesmia micrantha
taxonomy: Pseudohexadesmia micrantha is classified within the family Fabaceae and its order is Fabales. It belongs to the kingdom Plantae, phylum Magnoliophyta, and class Magnoliopsida. This classification places Pseudohexadesmia micrantha within the broader context of flowering plants. The family Fabaceae is a large and diverse group that includes legumes, and Pseudohexadesmia micrantha is one of its lesser-known members. Further research is necessary to fully understand the taxonomic relationships within the Fabaceae family.
